# ADR-0005: Mutual B

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-09 — supersedes ADR-0004

## Context

Claims to supersede ADR-0004, which itself claims to supersede this ADR — both Accepted at once. Seeded violation: two Accepted ADRs claiming to supersede each other (D2).

N/A — fixture file.
